---
title: "in situ gas flux quantification"
author: "Vojtech Tlaskal"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    latex-engine: xelatex      
    geometry: margin=1in
---

## Data Processing Pipeline

This code reports quantification of gas flux. Raw Li-Cor data were processed using custom Shiny app 

Tlaskal, V. (2023). TlaskalV/Licor_app: v1.0. doi: 10.5281/ZENODO.7678827


```{r setup}
# Load required libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(tidylog)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(openxlsx2)

# Set global options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r}
# load ideal gas law values
source("ideal_gas_law.R")

# licor rates calculated from app
licor_rates <- read_excel("go_licor_rates_from_app.xlsx") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names() %>% 
  mutate(date = lubridate::dmy(date)) %>%
  left_join(metadata, by = "id") %>%
  dplyr::rename(ch4_ppb = ch4) %>% # specify units
  mutate(ch4 = ch4_ppb/1000) %>% # convert ppb to ppm
  pivot_longer(cols = c('co2', 'ch4'),
               names_to = 'gas',
               values_to ='rate') %>%
  mutate(chamber_volume_l = (((pi * ((11/100)/2)^2) * (10/100)) * 1000)) %>%  # volume diameter 11 cm, height of the collar 10 cm, in litres/dm3
  mutate(mol_air_in_chamber = ((pressure * chamber_volume_l)/(R_const * (273.15 + temp_20220726)))) %>% # calculate mol of air in the chamber at given temperature measured on 20220726
  mutate(mol_change_target = mol_air_in_chamber/(1000000/rate)) %>% # which fraction is target gas
  left_join(molar_mass, "gas") %>% # add molar mass
  mutate(g_s_target = mol_change_target * molar_mass) %>% # get weight of gas per second
  mutate(g_s_m = g_s_target/(pi * ((11/100)/2)^2)) %>% # correct for m2 area of diameter 11 cm of the collar
  mutate(mg_h_m = (g_s_m * 3600 * 1000)) %>% # final unit fix - mg per hour
  filter(transect != 3) %>% # remove transect without temperature gradient
  glimpse

# calculate average value
day_averaged <- licor_rates |> 
  group_by(gas, plot, transect) |> 
  dplyr::summarise(mean = mean(mg_h_m), n = n()) |> 
  ungroup() |> 
  print()
Rmisc::summarySE(data = day_averaged, groupvars = c("gas", "plot"), measurevar = "mean")
```

## Visualization

```{r}
# Data processing - keep individual observations AND calculate summary stats
individual_data <- licor_rates %>%
  mutate(site = fct_recode(plot, Unwarmed = "A", `Long−term warmed` = "E")) |> 
  glimpse()

# Calculate summary statistics for mean lines and error bars
summary_stats <- individual_data |> 
  group_by(gas, site) |> 
  dplyr::summarise(
    mean = mean(mg_h_m), 
    se = sd(mg_h_m) / sqrt(length(mg_h_m)), 
    n_obs = length(mg_h_m),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

# Create the plot with individual points, mean lines, and error bars
licor_plot_rates_boxplot_ch4 <- ggplot() +
  
  # Add individual points
  geom_point(data = filter(individual_data, gas == "ch4"),
             aes(x = site, y = mg_h_m, color = site),
             size = 3, position = position_jitter(width = 0.1, seed = 123)) +
  
  # Add mean lines (vertical segments)
  geom_segment(data = filter(summary_stats, gas == "ch4"),
               aes(x = as.numeric(factor(site)) - 0.1,
                   xend = as.numeric(factor(site)) + 0.1,
                   y = mean,
                   yend = mean),  # Adjust yend for the top of the segment
               color = "black",
               linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  # Add error bars (SE)
  geom_errorbar(data = filter(summary_stats, gas == "ch4"),
                aes(x = site,
                    y = mean,
                    ymin = mean - se,
                    ymax = mean + se),
                color = "black",
                width = 0.1,  # Width for better visibility
                linewidth = 1) +
  
  # Color scheme using ColorBrewer Set2
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  
  # Axis labels
  ylab(expression("rate of CH"[4] * " flux [mg m"[2]^-1 * "h"^-1 * "]")) +
  
  # Theme customization matching your style
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),  # Remove facet titles
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )


# Display the plot
print(licor_plot_rates_boxplot_ch4)

# Create the plot with individual points, mean lines, and error bars
licor_plot_rates_boxplot_co2 <- ggplot() +
  
  # Add individual points
  geom_point(data = filter(individual_data, gas == "co2"),
             aes(x = site, y = mg_h_m, color = site),
             size = 3, position = position_jitter(width = 0.1, seed = 123)) +
  
  # Add mean lines (vertical segments)
  geom_segment(data = filter(summary_stats, gas == "co2"),
               aes(x = as.numeric(factor(site)) - 0.1,
                   xend = as.numeric(factor(site)) + 0.1,
                   y = mean,
                   yend = mean),  # Adjust yend for the top of the segment
               color = "black",
               linewidth = 1.2) +
  
  # Add error bars (SE)
  geom_errorbar(data = filter(summary_stats, gas == "co2"),
                aes(x = site,
                    y = mean,
                    ymin = mean - se,
                    ymax = mean + se),
                color = "black",
                width = 0.1,  # Width for better visibility
                linewidth = 1) +
  
  # Color scheme using ColorBrewer Set2 (colorblind-safe)
  scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  
  # Axis labels
  ylab(expression("rate of CO"[2] * " flux [mg m"[2]^-1 * "h"^-1 * "]")) +
  
  # Theme customization matching your style
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    panel.border = element_blank(),
    legend.title = element_blank(),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 0),
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.line = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.ticks = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.8),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black", size = 11),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black", size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_blank(),  # Remove facet titles
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(20, 20, 20, 20)
  )

# Display the plot
print(licor_plot_rates_boxplot_co2)
```
